topics.name: Daily Briefings
topics.description: Structured daily and weekly operating summaries delivered by Alice
routing_rules: Morning brief (sent 7–8am on weekdays)
End-of-day summary (sent 5–6pm)
Weekly review digest (sent Monday morning)
Meeting prep briefs (sent 30 min before calendar events)

topics.name: Urgent Escalations
topics.description: High-priority alerts requiring immediate attention — P0/P1 only
routing_rules: P0 alerts: production incidents, blocking outages
P1 alerts: same-day deadline breaches, legal/financial risk
Incident response updates and resolution notices
Commitments overdue by more than 24 hours with external parties

topics.name: Operations
topics.description: Day-to-day task and workflow coordination updates
routing_rules: Task status changes (assigned, blocked, completed)
Blocker alerts when tasks are stuck for more than 4 hours
Ownership handoffs and delegation confirmations
Recurring workflow check-ins and pulse updates

topics.name: Decisions
topics.description: Decision records extracted from meetings and threads, plus pending decisions queue
routing_rules: Decisions extracted from meeting transcripts
Decisions inferred from resolved Slack threads
Pending decisions awaiting owner sign-off
Decision context and supporting rationale summaries

topics.name: Research
topics.description: On-demand lookups, background research, and prep briefs
routing_rules: Entity lookups (people, companies, competitors)
Background research briefs triggered by /alice-brief
Pre-meeting context cards (attendee backgrounds, company overview)
Competitive intelligence summaries and market context

topics.name: Builds
topics.description: Engineering delivery pipeline — PR status, deploys, and QA
routing_rules: PR opened, review requested, or merged events
Deployment success and failure notifications
QA handoff notifications and test result summaries
Build failures and CI/CD pipeline alerts
